title: Fresh Filipino Tiger Prawns Pinakbet
description: A nutty and juicy Filipino dish featuring raw tiger prawns, steamed to perfection with a variety of vegetables, perfect for a sick day, this vegetarian-friendly pinakbet is a hearty and comforting meal
instructions: In a large pot, bring 2 inches of water to a boil over high heat
Reduce the heat to medium-low and place a steamer basket over the pot
Add the sliced bitter melon, eggplant, and okra to the steamer basket
Steam the vegetables for 5 minutes, or until they start to soften
Add the chopped tomato, onion, and minced garlic to the steamer basket
Steam for an additional 5 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender
Add the raw tiger prawns to the steamer basket and steam for 2-3 minutes, or until they are pink and cooked through
In a small bowl, mix together the fish sauce, salt, and black pepper
Pour the fish sauce mixture over the steamed vegetables and prawns
Serve the pinakbet hot, garnished with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of black pepper
